name: Toggl + Jira Multi-Intent
description: Multi-intent capture with both a time log and a ticket. HeuristicRouter returns nil (2 intents matched), so Castellum handles it. Tests that both a Toggl and Jira action are parsed from a single response.
rawText: Log 1 hour on the auth bug fix and create a Jira ticket to track it

rawContentBlocks.text:
I'll log 1 hour in Toggl for the auth bug fix and create a Jira ticket to track the work.
